cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the text and look for information about Wu Jinyou. The text says: "Wu Jinyou, head of the Polar Research Institute of China, and the group's leader, said, 'I hope the students have not only a field trip to the Yellow River station, but are also touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers here. I also expect in the future, some of them will choose to devote themselves to polar research and maybe even work with us.'" From this, we can see that Wu Jinyou is the head of the Polar Research Institute of China and the leader of the group. He expressed his hope that the students are touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. He also expects that some of them might choose to become polar researchers. Now let's check the options: (A) He is a graduate from Dalian Marinetime University. - The text mentions Zheng Li is a student from Dalian Marinetime University, but there's no information about Wu Jinyou's education. (B) He is the president of Dalian Marinetime University. - There's no mention of him being the president of any university. (C) He thinks highly of the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. - This is supported by the text where he expresses his hope that the students are touched by the devotion and spirit of the researchers. (D) He is sure that all the ten students will make good polar researchers. - The text says he expects that "some of them" will choose to become polar researchers.
